themes.title: Core Collaboration Features
themes.description: Implement essential features for real-time collaboration.

themes.title: Enhanced User Experience
themes.description: Focus on improving the mobile editing experience and conducting tests.

milestones.name: MVP: Security Compliance and Mobile Support
milestones.description: Ensure security compliance for collaboration features and support mobile editing.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve security compliance certification and enable mobile editing support.

milestones.name: V1: Monitor and Document Collaboration Features
milestones.description: Implement monitoring of concurrent edit attempts and document collaboration features.
milestones.success_criteria: Successfully monitor concurrent edits and provide documentation for collaboration features.

milestones.name: V2: Enhance Mobile Editing and A/B Testing
milestones.description: Enhance mobile editing experience and conduct A/B testing on collaboration features.
milestones.success_criteria: Improve mobile editing experience and complete A/B testing with actionable insights.

sequencing.reason: V1 requires the completion of MVP to ensure security and mobile support are in place.
V2 builds on the features and insights gained from V1 to enhance mobile editing and conduct tests.

mvp.goal: Establish a secure and functional mobile editing environment.

v1.goal: Implement monitoring and documentation for collaboration features.

v2.goal: Enhance mobile editing and validate features through A/B testing.
